title: Lodha Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lodha Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!
